content.en:
TNoodle Images

TNoodle is a WCA scramble program.

Download and install Java form https:// java.com/zh-CN/download/ and TNoodle-WCA-0.15.1.jar from

https://github.com/thewca/tnoodle/releases/download/v0.15.1/TNoodle-WCA-0.15.1.jar, and put URL in browser. https://tnoodle.cuber.pro/

打乱字体: Courier New, 字号20

3x3

2x2

localhost:2014/view/333.svg?scramble=B2 U2 R2 B2 U B2 U' B2 U L2 U F L' B U L2 F U B' U2 L

localhost:2014/view/222.svg?scramble=R' F2 U2 R U' R U2 R F' U' F'

SQ1

Solved

localhost:2014/view/sq1.svg?scramble=(-2,3) / (6,3) / (2,-1) / (4,-5) / (-3,0) / (3,-1) / (0,-3) / (0,-2) / (2,0) / (0,-2) / (-5,0) / (6,0) / (-3,0)

WCA打乱从2014年才开始在数据库中有。

最短打乱

TNoodle理论上最少是11, 最多未知.

最长打乱

https://worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/UdmurtiaOpen2019/scrambles?event=333
